title: 11 Herbal Creams to Treat Dermatitis in Babies
description: Echinacea purpurea creams can help with dermatitis by reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The creams contain properties such as alkylamides and caffeic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These compounds help to calm the skin, reduce redness, and prevent further irritation.  To try Echinacea purpurea creams for dermatitis, apply a thin layer to the affected area 2-3 times a day.
